title: RCAN Compatibility Matrix — version tuple ENVELOPE (hybrid-signed wrapper)
description: Signed wrapper around a version-tuple payload. Per RCAN v3.2 Decision 3 (pqc-hybrid-v1, PQ-required-classical-optional): signature_mldsa65 is REQUIRED; signature_ed25519 is OPTIONAL but if present must verify and must be paired with `kid`.

ran.description: RAN of the signing authority. Resolves to /v2/authorities/<ran> for public-key lookup.

alg.description: Signature algorithms present, in order. Index 0 is always ML-DSA-65 (required); index 1 is Ed25519 if signature_ed25519 is present.

pq_kid.description: ML-DSA-65 key id. Aggregator-style derives as sha256(pq_pub)[:8].hex() (e.g. '8e2d0b5f'); release-signing-namespaced style is '<slug>-release-signing-<urlsafe-b64>' (e.g. 'rcan-spec-release-signing-xqn_7unHwK8') per opencastor-ops register_release_signing_ran.py. Must match pq_kid stored on /v2/authorities/<ran>.

kid.description: Optional Ed25519 key id. Only present when signature_ed25519 is present. Same character class as pq_kid.

payload.description: Base64-encoded canonical-JSON of the inner version-tuple payload (sorted keys, no whitespace, UTF-8).

signature_mldsa65.description: Base64-encoded ML-DSA-65 signature over the b64-decoded payload bytes. Verified against /v2/authorities/<ran>.pq_signing_pub.

signature_ed25519.description: Optional. Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature over the same b64-decoded payload bytes. Verified against /v2/authorities/<ran>.signing_pub. If present, MUST verify; absent is OK.

signed_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp of when the envelope was signed.
